---
name: Implementation Ticket
about: Plan and track a requested project change before implementation.
title: "[Ticket]: "
labels: bug, documentation, feature, New System, quick fix, Refactor, UI
assignees: ''

---

## Summary
Briefly describe the requested change.

## What Will Happen
Describe what the player, developer, or system will experience after this change.

## What Will Change
List the expected code, UI, data, or behavior changes.

## Objectives
- [ ] Objective 1
- [ ] Objective 2
- [ ] Objective 3

## Goals
Explain why this change matters.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] The requested behavior works as described.
- [ ] The change respects AGENTS.md, GDD.md, and GTD.md.
- [ ] Game logic remains separate from React UI.
- [ ] No unrelated systems are expanded.
- [ ] Relevant build/test/manual checks pass.

## GDD / GTD Alignment
Describe how this change fits the design and technical architecture.

## Out of Scope
List anything that should not be implemented as part of this ticket.

## Implementation Notes
Add technical notes, affected files, or planned approach.

## Verification Plan
List how this should be checked before closing the issue.

## Completion Notes
Filled in after implementation.
